summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT 3×3 unit area split into 4 color-coded regions (RED TP, ORANGE FN, YELLOW FP, GREEN TN) with sens=0.99, spec=0.95. ValueTracker prior_tr sweeps P(D) from 0.01 → 0.20; always_redraw cell sizes. RIGHT has live prior/sens/spec/P(+)/P(D|+) + small posterior-vs-prior plot with YELLOW cursor.
